title: Earthify
description: A small mod that enhances the natural world of Minecraft
body: --- ## 🌿 About **Earthify** is a mod focused on enhancing the natural world of Minecraft. It introduces new flora, unique creatures, and immersive details to make exploration more interesting and alive. The goal of the mod is to stay close to vanilla style while adding meaningful diversity to the game. --- ## ✨ Features - 🌱 New plants and crops - 🌸 Decorative flowers and potted variants - 🐾 New creatures - 🌍 Improved world variety and atmosphere - 🎨 Vanilla-friendly design --- ## 🐄 Creatures The mod adds new mobs that naturally fit into the Minecraft ecosystem. Each creature is designed by **Mojang** but didn't add to the main game. --- ## 🌼 Plants Discover new types of vegetation across the world, including decorative flowers and functional crops. Some plants can also be placed in flower pots for additional decoration.
